org: The University of Hong Kong / Nanjing University
tEn: Pyramid Vision Transformer: A Versatile Backbone for Dense Prediction without Convolutions
tZh: 金字塔视觉Transformer：无需卷积的密集预测通用骨干网络
sEn: PVT is a pyramid vision transformer backbone for dense prediction tasks, outperforming CNNs without convolutions.
sZh: PVT是一种用于密集预测任务的金字塔视觉Transformer骨干网络，无需卷积即可超越CNN。
absEn: Although using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) as backbones achieves great successes in computer vision, this work investigates a simple backbone network useful for many dense prediction tasks without convolutions. Unlike the recently-proposed Transformer model (e.g., ViT) that is specially designed for image classification, we propose Pyramid Vision Transformer~(PVT), which overcomes the difficulties of porting Transformer to various dense prediction tasks. PVT has several merits compared to prior arts. (1) Different from ViT that typically has low-resolution outputs and high computational and memory cost, PVT can be not only trained on dense partitions of the image to achieve high output resolution, which is important for dense predictions but also using a progressive shrinking pyramid to reduce computations of large feature maps. (2) PVT inherits the advantages from both CNN and Transformer, making it a unified backbone in various vision tasks without convolutions by simply replacing CNN backbones. (3) We validate PVT by conducting extensive experiments, showing that it boosts the performance of many downstream tasks, e.g., object detection, semantic, and instance segmentation. For example, with a comparable number of parameters, RetinaNet+PVT achieves 40.4 AP on the COCO dataset, surpassing RetinNet+ResNet50 (36.3 AP) by 4.1 absolute AP. We hope PVT could serve as an alternative and useful backbone for pixel-level predictions and facilitate future researches. Code is available at https://github.com/whai362/PVT.
absZh: 尽管使用卷积神经网络（CNN）作为骨干网络在计算机视觉中取得了巨大成功，但本文研究了一种无需卷积即可用于许多密集预测任务的简单骨干网络。与最近专门为图像分类设计的Transformer模型（如ViT）不同，我们提出了金字塔视觉Transformer（PVT），它克服了将Transformer移植到各种密集预测任务的困难。与现有技术相比，PVT具有几个优点。（1）与ViT通常具有低分辨率输出和高计算及内存成本不同，PVT不仅可以在图像的密集分区上进行训练以获得高输出分辨率（这对密集预测很重要），还可以使用渐进式收缩金字塔来减少大特征图的计算量。（2）PVT继承了CNN和Transformer的优点，通过简单地替换CNN骨干网络，使其成为各种视觉任务中无需卷积的统一骨干网络。（3）我们通过大量实验验证了PVT，表明它提升了许多下游任务的性能，例如目标检测、语义分割和实例分割。例如，在参数数量相当的情况下，RetinaNet+PVT在COCO数据集上达到了40.4 AP，比RetinaNet+ResNet50（36.3 AP）高出4.1个绝对AP。我们希望PVT能够成为像素级预测的替代且有用的骨干网络，并促进未来的研究。代码可在https://github.com/whai362/PVT获取。

contrib.en: Proposes Pyramid Vision Transformer (PVT), the first pure Transformer backbone for dense prediction tasks.
contrib.zh: 提出金字塔视觉Transformer（PVT），首个用于密集预测任务的纯Transformer骨干网络。

contrib.en: Introduces progressive shrinking pyramid to generate multi-scale feature maps, enabling flexible adaptation to dense prediction.
contrib.zh: 引入渐进式收缩金字塔以生成多尺度特征图，实现对密集预测的灵活适配。

contrib.en: Designs spatial-reduction attention (SRA) to reduce computational and memory costs for high-resolution features.
contrib.zh: 设计空间缩减注意力（SRA）以降低高分辨率特征的计算和内存开销。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation with fewer parameters.
contrib.zh: 在目标检测、实例分割和语义分割上以更少参数取得领先结果。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that PVT can replace CNN backbones in various vision tasks without convolutions.
contrib.zh: 证明PVT可在无卷积情况下替代CNN骨干用于多种视觉任务。

contrib.en: Builds first convolution-free object detection pipeline by combining PVT with DETR.
contrib.zh: 通过结合PVT与DETR构建首个无卷积目标检测流程。

limits.en: PVT has higher computational cost than ResNet for large input scales (e.g., >640x640).
limits.zh: PVT在大输入尺度（如>640x640）下计算成本高于ResNet。

limits.en: Inference speed of PVT-based RetinaNet is slower than ResNet50-based model on COCO (800px short side).
limits.zh: 在COCO（短边800像素）上，基于PVT的RetinaNet推理速度慢于基于ResNet50的模型。

limits.en: Specific CNN modules like SE, SK, dilated convolution, and NAS are not integrated into PVT.
limits.zh: 未集成SE、SK、空洞卷积和NAS等特定CNN模块。

limits.en: PVT is still in early development stage compared to well-engineered CNN backbones like EfficientNet.
limits.zh: 与EfficientNet等精心设计的CNN骨干相比，PVT仍处于早期发展阶段。

limits.en: Position embeddings pre-trained on ImageNet may require interpolation for arbitrary input sizes in downstream tasks.
limits.zh: 在ImageNet上预训练的位置嵌入在下游任务中需针对任意输入尺寸进行插值。

items.en: Although convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved great success in computer vision, this work investigates a simpler, convolution-free backbone network useful for many dense prediction tasks. Unlike the recently-proposed Vision Transformer (ViT) that was designed for image classification specifically, we introduce the Pyramid Vision Transformer (PVT)††🖂 Corresponding authors: Deng-Ping Fan (dengpfan@gmail.com); Tong Lu (lutong@nju.edu.cn)., which overcomes the difficulties of porting Transformer to various dense prediction tasks. PVT has several merits compared to current state of the arts. (1) Different from ViT that typically yields low-resolution outputs and incurs high computational and memory costs, PVT not only can be trained on dense partitions of an image to achieve high output resolution, which is important for dense prediction, but also uses a progressive shrinking pyramid to reduce the computations of large feature maps. (2) PVT inherits the advantages of both CNN and Transformer, making it a unified backbone for various vision tasks without convolutions, where it can be used as a direct replacement for CNN backbones. (3) We validate PVT through extensive experiments, showing that it boosts the performance of many downstream tasks, including object detection, instance and semantic segmentation. For example, with a comparable number of parameters, PVT+RetinaNet achieves 40.4 AP on the COCO dataset, surpassing ResNet50+RetinNet (36.3 AP) by 4.1 absolute AP (see Figure 2). We hope that PVT could serve as an alternative and useful backbone for pixel-level predictions and facilitate future research.
items.zh: 尽管卷积神经网络（CNN）在计算机视觉中取得了巨大成功，但本文研究了一种更简单、无卷积的骨干网络，适用于许多密集预测任务。与最近专门为图像分类设计的Vision Transformer（ViT）不同，我们引入了金字塔视觉Transformer（PVT），它克服了将Transformer移植到各种密集预测任务的困难。与当前最先进的方法相比，PVT具有以下几个优点：（1）与ViT通常产生低分辨率输出并导致高计算和内存成本不同，PVT不仅可以在图像的密集分区上进行训练以获得高输出分辨率（这对密集预测很重要），而且使用渐进式收缩金字塔来减少大特征图的计算量。（2）PVT继承了CNN和Transformer的优点，使其成为无需卷积的统一骨干网络，可用于各种视觉任务，并可直接替代CNN骨干网络。（3）我们通过大量实验验证了PVT，表明它提升了许多下游任务的性能，包括目标检测、实例分割和语义分割。例如，在参数数量相当的情况下，PVT+RetinaNet在COCO数据集上达到了40.4 AP，超过ResNet50+RetinaNet（36.3 AP）4.1个绝对AP（见图2）。我们希望PVT能够作为像素级预测的替代且有用的骨干网络，并促进未来的研究。

items.en: Convolutional neural network (CNNs) have achieved remarkable success in computer vision, making them a versatile and dominant approach for almost all tasks [54, 22, 73, 49, 21, 39, 9, 32]. Nevertheless, this work aims to explore an alternative backbone network beyond CNN, which can be used for dense prediction tasks such as object detection [40, 14], semantic [83] and instance segmentation [40], in addition to image classification [12].
items.zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）在计算机视觉中取得了显著成功，使其成为几乎所有任务的多功能且主导的方法 [54, 22, 73, 49, 21, 39, 9, 32]。然而，本文旨在探索一种超越CNN的替代骨干网络，该网络可用于密集预测任务，如目标检测 [40, 14]、语义分割 [83] 和实例分割 [40]，以及图像分类 [12]。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Performance comparison on COCO val2017 of different backbones using RetinaNet for object detection, where “T”, “S”, “M” and “L” denote our PVT models with tiny, small, medium and large size. We see that when the number of parameters among different models are comparable, PVT variants significantly outperform their corresponding counterparts such as ResNets (R) [22], ResNeXts (X) [73], and ViT [13].
items.capZh: 图2：使用RetinaNet进行目标检测时，不同骨干网络在COCO val2017上的性能比较，其中“T”、“S”、“M”和“L”分别表示我们的PVT模型的小型、小型、中型和大型。我们看到，当不同模型的参数数量相当时，PVT变体显著优于其对应的同类模型，如ResNet（R）[22]、ResNeXt（X）[73]和ViT [13]。

items.en: Inspired by the success of Transformer [64] in natural language processing, many researchers have explored its application in computer vision. For example, some works [6, 85, 72, 56, 24, 42] model the vision task as a dictionary lookup problem with learnable queries, and use the Transformer decoder as a task-specific head on top of the CNN backbone. Although some prior arts have also incorporated attention modules [70, 48, 80] into CNNs, as far as we know, exploring a clean and convolution-free Transformer backbone to address dense prediction tasks in computer vision is rarely studied.
items.zh: 受Transformer [64]在自然语言处理中成功的启发，许多研究人员探索了其在计算机视觉中的应用。例如，一些工作 [6, 85, 72, 56, 24, 42] 将视觉任务建模为具有可学习查询的字典查找问题，并使用Transformer解码器作为CNN骨干网络上的任务特定头部。尽管一些先前的工作也将注意力模块 [70, 48, 80] 集成到CNN中，但据我们所知，探索一个干净且无卷积的Transformer骨干网络来解决计算机视觉中的密集预测任务还很少被研究。

items.en: Recently, Dosovitskiy et al. [13] introduced the Vision Transformer (ViT) for image classification. This is an interesting and meaningful attempt to replace the CNN backbone with a convolution-free model. As shown in Figure 1 (b), ViT has a columnar structure with coarse image patches as input.111Due to resource constraints, ViT cannot use fine-grained image patches (e.g., 4×\times4 pixels per patch) as input, instead only receive coarse patches (e.g., 32×\times32 pixels per patch) as input, which leads to its low output resolution (e.g., 32-stride). Although ViT is applicable to image classification, it is challenging to directly adapt it to pixel-level dense predictions such as object detection and segmentation, because (1) its output feature map is single-scale and low-resolution, and (2) its computational and memory costs are relatively high even for common input image sizes (e.g., shorter edge of 800 pixels in the COCO benchmark [40]).
items.zh: 最近，Dosovitskiy等人 [13] 引入了用于图像分类的Vision Transformer（ViT）。这是一个有趣且有意义的尝试，用无卷积模型替代CNN骨干网络。如图1（b）所示，ViT具有柱状结构，输入为粗粒度图像块。由于资源限制，ViT无法使用细粒度图像块（例如，每块4×4像素）作为输入，而只能接收粗粒度块（例如，每块32×32像素）作为输入，这导致其输出分辨率低（例如，32步长）。尽管ViT适用于图像分类，但直接将其适应于像素级密集预测（如目标检测和分割）具有挑战性，因为（1）其输出特征图是单尺度和低分辨率的，（2）即使对于常见的输入图像尺寸（例如，COCO基准测试 [40] 中较短边为800像素），其计算和内存成本也相对较高。

items.en: To address the above limitations, this work proposes a pure Transformer backbone, termed Pyramid Vision Transformer (PVT), which can serve as an alternative to the CNN backbone in many downstream tasks, including image-level prediction as well as pixel-level dense predictions. Specifically, as illustrated in Figure 1 (c), our PVT overcomes the difficulties of the conventional Transformer by (1) taking fine-grained image patches (i.e., 4×\times4 pixels per patch) as input to learn high-resolution representation, which is essential for dense prediction tasks; (2) introducing a progressive shrinking pyramid to reduce the sequence length of Transformer as the network deepens, significantly reducing the computational cost, and (3) adopting a spatial-reduction attention (SRA) layer to further reduce the resource consumption when learning high-resolution features.
items.zh: 为了解决上述限制，本文提出了一种纯Transformer骨干网络，称为金字塔视觉Transformer（PVT），它可以在许多下游任务中替代CNN骨干网络，包括图像级预测以及像素级密集预测。具体来说，如图1（c）所示，我们的PVT通过以下方式克服了传统Transformer的困难：（1）采用细粒度图像块（即每块4×4像素）作为输入以学习高分辨率表示，这对密集预测任务至关重要；（2）引入渐进式收缩金字塔，随着网络加深减少Transformer的序列长度，显著降低计算成本；（3）采用空间缩减注意力（SRA）层，进一步减少学习高分辨率特征时的资源消耗。

items.en: Overall, the proposed PVT possesses the following merits. Firstly, compared to the traditional CNN backbones (see Figure 1 (a)), which have local receptive fields that increase with the network depth, our PVT always produces a global receptive field, which is more suitable for detection and segmentation. Secondly, compared to ViT (see Figure 1 (b)), thanks to its advanced pyramid structure, our method can more easily be plugged into many representative dense prediction pipelines, e.g., RetinaNet [39] and Mask R-CNN [21]. Thirdly, we can build a convolution-free pipeline by combining our PVT with other task-specific Transformer decoders, such as PVT+DETR [6] for object detection. To our knowledge, this is the first entirely convolution-free object detection pipeline.
items.zh: 总体而言，所提出的PVT具有以下优点。首先，与传统的CNN骨干网络（见图1（a））相比，后者具有随网络深度增加的局部感受野，而我们的PVT始终产生全局感受野，更适合检测和分割。其次，与ViT（见图1（b））相比，由于其先进的金字塔结构，我们的方法可以更容易地插入许多代表性的密集预测流水线中，例如RetinaNet [39] 和Mask R-CNN [21]。第三，我们可以通过将PVT与其他任务特定的Transformer解码器（例如用于目标检测的PVT+DETR [6]）相结合，构建无卷积流水线。据我们所知，这是第一个完全无卷积的目标检测流水线。

items.en: (1) We propose Pyramid Vision Transformer (PVT), which is the first pure Transformer backbone designed for various pixel-level dense prediction tasks. Combining our PVT and DETR, we can construct an end-to-end object detection system without convolutions and handcrafted components such as dense anchors and non-maximum suppression (NMS).
items.zh: （1）我们提出了金字塔视觉Transformer（PVT），这是第一个专为各种像素级密集预测任务设计的纯Transformer骨干网络。结合我们的PVT和DETR，我们可以构建一个端到端的目标检测系统，无需卷积和手工设计的组件，如密集锚点和非极大值抑制（NMS）。

items.en: (2) We overcome many difficulties when porting Transformer to dense predictions, by designing a progressive shrinking pyramid and a spatial-reduction attention (SRA). These are able to reduce the resource consumption of Transformer, making PVT flexible to learning multi-scale and high-resolution features.
items.zh: （2）我们通过设计渐进式收缩金字塔和空间缩减注意力（SRA），克服了将Transformer移植到密集预测时的许多困难。这些能够减少Transformer的资源消耗，使PVT能够灵活地学习多尺度和高分辨率特征。

items.en: (3) We evaluate the proposed PVT on several different tasks, including image classification, object detection, instance and semantic segmentation, and compare it with popular ResNets [22] and ResNeXts [73]. As presented in Figure 2, our PVT with different parameter scales can consistently archived improved performance compared to the prior arts. For example, under a comparable number of parameters, using RetinaNet [39] for object detection, PVT-Small achieves 40.4 AP on COCO val2017, outperforming ResNet50 by 4.1 points (40.4 vs. 36.3). Moreover, PVT-Large achieves 42.6 AP, which is 1.6 points better than ResNeXt101-64x4d, with 30% less parameters.
items.zh: （3）我们在多个不同任务上评估了所提出的PVT，包括图像分类、目标检测、实例分割和语义分割，并将其与流行的ResNet [22] 和ResNeXt [73] 进行了比较。如图2所示，我们的PVT在不同参数规模下始终能够获得比先前方法更好的性能。例如，在参数数量相当的情况下，使用RetinaNet [39] 进行目标检测，PVT-Small在COCO val2017上达到40.4 AP，超过ResNet50 4.1个点（40.4 vs. 36.3）。此外，PVT-Large达到42.6 AP，比ResNeXt101-64x4d好1.6个点，同时参数减少30%。

items.en: CNNs are the work-horses of deep neural networks in visual recognition. The standard CNN was first introduced in [34] to distinguish handwritten numbers. The model contains convolutional kernels with a certain receptive field that captures favorable visual context. To provide translation equivariance, the weights of convolutional kernels are shared over the entire image space. More recently, with the rapid development of the computational resources (e.g., GPU), the successful training of stacked convolutional blocks [33, 54] on large-scale image classification datasets (e.g., ImageNet [51]) has become possible. For instance, GoogLeNet [59] demonstrated that a convolutional operator containing multiple kernel paths can achieve very competitive performance. The effectiveness of a multi-path convolutional block was further validated in Inception series [60, 58], ResNeXt [73], DPN [10], MixNet [65] and SKNet [36]. Further, ResNet [22] introduced skip connections into the convolutional block, making it possible to create/train very deep networks and obtaining impressive results in the field of computer vision. DenseNet [25] introduced a densely connected topology, which connects each convolutional block to all previous blocks. More recent advances can be found in recent survey/review papers [31, 53].
items.zh: CNN是视觉识别中深度神经网络的主力。标准CNN首次在 [34] 中引入，用于区分手写数字。该模型包含具有一定感受野的卷积核，用于捕获有利的视觉上下文。为了提供平移等变性，卷积核的权重在整个图像空间上共享。最近，随着计算资源（例如GPU）的快速发展，在大规模图像分类数据集（例如ImageNet [51]）上成功训练堆叠的卷积块 [33, 54] 成为可能。例如，GoogLeNet [59] 表明，包含多个核路径的卷积算子可以实现非常有竞争力的性能。多路径卷积块的有效性在Inception系列 [60, 58]、ResNeXt [73]、DPN [10]、MixNet [65] 和SKNet [36] 中得到了进一步验证。此外，ResNet [22] 在卷积块中引入了跳跃连接，使得创建/训练非常深的网络成为可能，并在计算机视觉领域取得了令人印象深刻的结果。DenseNet [25] 引入了密集连接拓扑，将每个卷积块连接到所有之前的块。最近的进展可以在最近的综述论文 [31, 53] 中找到。

items.en: Unlike the full-blown CNNs, the vision Transformer backbone is still in its early stage of development. In this work, we try to extend the scope of Vision Transformer by designing a new versatile Transformer backbone suitable for most vision tasks.
items.zh: 与成熟的CNN不同，视觉Transformer骨干网络仍处于早期发展阶段。在这项工作中，我们试图通过设计一种适用于大多数视觉任务的新型多功能Transformer骨干网络来扩展Vision Transformer的范围。

items.en: Preliminary. The dense prediction task aims to perform pixel-level classification or regression on a feature map. Object detection and semantic segmentation are two representative dense prediction tasks.
items.zh: 预备知识。密集预测任务旨在对特征图进行像素级分类或回归。目标检测和语义分割是两个代表性的密集预测任务。

items.en: Object Detection. In the era of deep learning, CNNs [34] have become the dominant framework for object detection, which includes single-stage detectors (e.g., SSD [43], RetinaNet [39], FCOS [62], GFL [37, 35], PolarMask [71] and OneNet [55]) and multi-stage detectors (Faster R-CNN [49], Mask R-CNN [21], Cascade R-CNN [4] and Sparse R-CNN [57]). Most of these popular object detectors are built on high-resolution or multi-scale feature maps to obtain good detection performance. Recently, DETR [6] and deformable DETR [85] combined the CNN backbone and the Transformer decoder to build an end-to-end object detector. Likewise, they also require high-resolution or multi-scale feature maps for accurate object detection.
items.zh: 目标检测。在深度学习时代，CNN [34] 已成为目标检测的主导框架，包括单阶段检测器（例如SSD [43]、RetinaNet [39]、FCOS [62]、GFL [37, 35]、PolarMask [71] 和OneNet [55]）和多阶段检测器（Faster R-CNN [49]、Mask R-CNN [21]、Cascade R-CNN [4] 和Sparse R-CNN [57]）。这些流行的目标检测器大多基于高分辨率或多尺度特征图以获得良好的检测性能。最近，DETR [6] 和可变形DETR [85] 结合了CNN骨干网络和Transformer解码器，构建了端到端的目标检测器。同样，它们也需要高分辨率或多尺度特征图以实现准确的目标检测。

items.en: Semantic Segmentation. CNNs also play an important role in semantic segmentation. In the early stages, FCN [44] introduced a fully convolutional architecture to generate a spatial segmentation map for a given image of any size. After that, the deconvolution operation was introduced by Noh et al. [47] and achieved impressive performance on the PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset [52]. Inspired by FCN, U-Net [50] was proposed for the medical image segmentation domain specifically, bridging the information flow between corresponding low-level and high-level feature maps of the same spatial sizes. To explore richer global context representation, Zhao et al. [81] designed a pyramid pooling module over various pooling scales, and Kirillov et al. [32] developed a lightweight segmentation head termed Semantic FPN, based on FPN [38]. Finally, the DeepLab family [8, 41] applies dilated convolutions to enlarge the receptive field while maintaining the feature map resolution. Similar to object detection methods, semantic segmentation models also rely on high-resolution or multi-scale feature maps.
items.zh: 语义分割。CNN在语义分割中也扮演着重要角色。早期，FCN [44] 引入了全卷积架构，为任意大小的给定图像生成空间分割图。之后，Noh等人 [47] 引入了反卷积操作，并在PASCAL VOC 2012数据集 [52] 上取得了令人印象深刻的性能。受FCN启发，U-Net [50] 专门为医学图像分割领域提出，桥接了相同空间尺寸的相应低级和高级特征图之间的信息流。为了探索更丰富的全局上下文表示，Zhao等人 [81] 设计了一个在不同池化尺度上的金字塔池化模块，Kirillov等人 [32] 开发了一个轻量级分割头，称为Semantic FPN，基于FPN [38]。最后，DeepLab系列 [8, 41] 应用空洞卷积来扩大感受野，同时保持特征图分辨率。与目标检测方法类似，语义分割模型也依赖于高分辨率或多尺度特征图。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Overall architecture of Pyramid Vision Transformer (PVT). The entire model is divided into four stages, each of which is comprised of a patch embedding layer and a Lisubscript𝐿𝑖L_{i}-layer Transformer encoder. Following a pyramid structure, the output resolution of the four stages progressively shrinks from high (4-stride) to low (32-stride).
items.capZh: 图3：金字塔视觉Transformer（PVT）的整体架构。整个模型分为四个阶段，每个阶段由一个块嵌入层和一个L_i层Transformer编码器组成。遵循金字塔结构，四个阶段的输出分辨率从高（4步长）逐渐缩小到低（32步长）。

items.en: As convolutional filter weights are usually fixed after training, they cannot be dynamically adapted to different inputs. Many methods have been proposed to alleviate this problem using dynamic filters [30] or self-attention operations [64]. The non-local block [70] attempts to model long-range dependencies in both space and time, which has been shown beneficial for accurate video classification. However, despite its success, the non-local operator suffers from the high computational and memory costs. Criss-cross [26] further reduces the complexity by generating sparse attention maps through a criss-cross path. Ramachandran et al. [48] proposed the stand-alone self-attention to replace convolutional layers with local self-attention units. AANet [3] achieves competitive results when combining the self-attention and convolutional operations. LambdaNetworks [2] uses the lambda layer, an efficient self-attention to replace the convolution in the CNN. DETR [6] utilizes the Transformer decoder to model object detection as an end-to-end dictionary lookup problem with learnable queries, successfully removing the need for handcrafted processes such as NMS. Based on DETR, deformable DETR [85] further adopts a deformable attention layer to focus on a sparse set of contextual elements, obtaining faster convergence and better performance. Recently, Vision Transformer (ViT) [13] employs a pure Transformer [64] model for image classification by treating an image as a sequence of patches. DeiT [63] further extends ViT using a novel distillation approach. Different from previous models, this work introduces the pyramid structure into Transformer to present a pure Transformer backbone for dense prediction tasks, rather than a task-specific head or an image classification model.
items.zh: 由于卷积滤波器权重通常在训练后固定，它们无法动态适应不同的输入。许多方法已被提出，使用动态滤波器 [30] 或自注意力操作 [64] 来缓解这个问题。非局部块 [70] 试图在空间和时间上建模长距离依赖关系，已被证明对准确的视频分类有益。然而，尽管取得了成功，非局部算子仍遭受高计算和内存成本。Criss-cross [26] 通过十字交叉路径生成稀疏注意力图，进一步降低了复杂度。Ramachandran等人 [48] 提出了独立自注意力，用局部自注意力单元替换卷积层。AANet [3] 在结合自注意力和卷积操作时取得了有竞争力的结果。LambdaNetworks [2] 使用lambda层，一种高效的自注意力来替换CNN中的卷积。DETR [6] 利用Transformer解码器将目标检测建模为具有可学习查询的端到端字典查找问题，成功消除了手工设计过程（如NMS）的需求。基于DETR，可变形DETR [85] 进一步采用可变形注意力层来关注稀疏的上下文元素集，获得更快的收敛和更好的性能。最近，Vision Transformer（ViT）[13] 通过将图像视为块序列，采用纯Transformer [64] 模型进行图像分类。DeiT [63] 使用一种新颖的蒸馏方法进一步扩展了ViT。与之前的模型不同，本文在Transformer中引入金字塔结构，提出用于密集预测任务的纯Transformer骨干网络，而不是任务特定的头部或图像分类模型。

items.en: Our goal is to introduce the pyramid structure into the Transformer framework, so that it can generate multi-scale feature maps for dense prediction tasks (e.g., object detection and semantic segmentation). An overview of PVT is depicted in Figure 3. Similar to CNN backbones [22], our method has four stages that generate feature maps of different scales. All stages share a similar architecture, which consists of a patch embedding layer and Lisubscript𝐿𝑖L_{i} Transformer encoder layers.
items.zh: 我们的目标是将金字塔结构引入Transformer框架，使其能够为密集预测任务（如目标检测和语义分割）生成多尺度特征图。PVT的概览如图3所示。与CNN骨干网络[22]类似，我们的方法包含四个阶段，生成不同尺度的特征图。所有阶段共享相似的架构，包括一个补丁嵌入层和L_i个Transformer编码器层。

items.en: In the first stage, given an input image of size H×W×3𝐻𝑊3H\!\times\!W\!\times\!3, we first divide it into H​W42𝐻𝑊superscript42\frac{HW}{4^{2}} patches,222As done for ResNet, we keep the highest resolution of our output feature map at 4-stride. each of size 4×4×34434\!\times\!4\!\times\!3. Then, we feed the flattened patches to a linear projection and obtain embedded patches of size H​W42×C1𝐻𝑊superscript42subscript𝐶1\frac{HW}{4^{2}}\!\times\!C_{1}. After that, the embedded patches along with a position embedding are passed through a Transformer encoder with L1subscript𝐿1L_{1} layers, and the output is reshaped to a feature map F1subscript𝐹1F_{1} of size H4×W4×C1𝐻4𝑊4subscript𝐶1\frac{H}{4}\!\times\!\frac{W}{4}\!\times\!C_{1}. In the same way, using the feature map from the previous stage as input, we obtain the following feature maps: F2subscript𝐹2F_{2}, F3subscript𝐹3F_{3}, and F4subscript𝐹4F_{4}, whose strides are 8, 16, and 32 pixels with respect to the input image. With the feature pyramid {F1,F2,F3,F4}subscript𝐹1subscript𝐹2subscript𝐹3subscript𝐹4\{F_{1},F_{2},F_{3},F_{4}\}, our method can be easily applied to most downstream tasks, including image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation.
items.zh: 在第一阶段，给定大小为H×W×3的输入图像，我们首先将其划分为HW/4²个补丁，²如ResNet所做，我们保持输出特征图的最高分辨率为4步长。每个补丁大小为4×4×3。然后，我们将展平的补丁输入线性投影，得到大小为HW/4²×C₁的嵌入补丁。之后，嵌入补丁与位置嵌入一起通过具有L₁层的Transformer编码器，输出被重塑为大小为H/4×W/4×C₁的特征图F₁。同样地，使用前一阶段的特征图作为输入，我们得到后续特征图：F₂、F₃和F₄，它们相对于输入图像的步长分别为8、16和32像素。借助特征金字塔{F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄}，我们的方法可以轻松应用于大多数下游任务，包括图像分类、目标检测和语义分割。

items.en: Unlike CNN backbone networks [54, 22], which use different convolutional strides to obtain multi-scale feature maps, our PVT uses a progressive shrinking strategy to control the scale of feature maps by patch embedding layers.
items.zh: 与使用不同卷积步长获取多尺度特征图的CNN骨干网络[54, 22]不同，我们的PVT采用渐进式收缩策略，通过补丁嵌入层控制特征图的尺度。

items.en: Here, we denote the patch size of the i𝑖i-th stage as Pisubscript𝑃𝑖P_{i}. At the beginning of stage i𝑖i, we first evenly divide the input feature map Fi−1∈ℝHi−1×Wi−1×Ci−1subscript𝐹𝑖1superscriptℝsubscript𝐻𝑖1subscript𝑊𝑖1subscript𝐶𝑖1F_{i\!-\!1}\!\in\!\mathbb{R}^{H_{i\!-\!1}\!\times\!W_{i\!-\!1}\!\times\!C_{i\!-\!1}} into Hi−1​Wi−1Pi2subscript𝐻𝑖1subscript𝑊𝑖1superscriptsubscript𝑃𝑖2\frac{H_{i\!-\!1}W_{i\!-\!1}}{P_{i}^{2}} patches, and then each patch is flatten and projected to a Cisubscript𝐶𝑖C_{i}-dimensional embedding. After the linear projection, the shape of the embedded patches can be viewed as Hi−1Pi×Wi−1Pi×Cisubscript𝐻𝑖1subscript𝑃𝑖subscript𝑊𝑖1subscript𝑃𝑖subscript𝐶𝑖\frac{H_{i\!-\!1}}{P_{i}}\!\times\!\frac{W_{i\!-\!1}}{P_{i}}\!\times\!C_{i}, where the height and width are Pisubscript𝑃𝑖P_{i} times smaller than the input.
items.zh: 这里，我们将第i阶段的补丁大小记为P_i。在第i阶段开始时，我们首先将输入特征图F_{i-1}∈ℝ^{H_{i-1}×W_{i-1}×C_{i-1}}均匀划分为H_{i-1}W_{i-1}/P_i²个补丁，然后将每个补丁展平并投影到C_i维嵌入。线性投影后，嵌入补丁的形状可视为H_{i-1}/P_i×W_{i-1}/P_i×C_i，其中高度和宽度是输入的P_i分之一。

items.en: In this way, we can flexibly adjust the scale of the feature map in each stage, making it possible to construct a feature pyramid for Transformer.
items.zh: 通过这种方式，我们可以灵活调整每个阶段特征图的尺度，从而为Transformer构建特征金字塔。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Multi-head attention (MHA) vs. spatial-reduction attention (SRA). With the spatial-reduction operation, the computational/memory cost of our SRA is much lower than that of MHA.
items.capZh: 图4：多头注意力（MHA）与空间缩减注意力（SRA）。通过空间缩减操作，我们的SRA的计算/内存成本远低于MHA。

items.en: The Transformer encoder in the stage i𝑖i has Lisubscript𝐿𝑖L_{i} encoder layers, each of which is composed of an attention layer and a feed-forward layer [64]. Since PVT needs to process high-resolution (e.g., 4-stride) feature maps, we propose a spatial-reduction attention (SRA) layer to replace the traditional multi-head attention (MHA) layer [64] in the encoder.
items.zh: 第i阶段的Transformer编码器有L_i个编码器层，每层由注意力层和前馈层组成[64]。由于PVT需要处理高分辨率（例如4步长）特征图，我们提出了一种空间缩减注意力（SRA）层来替代编码器中的传统多头注意力（MHA）层[64]。

items.en: Similar to MHA, our SRA receives a query Q𝑄Q, a key K𝐾K, and a value V𝑉V as input, and outputs a refined feature. The difference is that our SRA reduces the spatial scale of K𝐾K and V𝑉V before the attention operation (see Figure 4), which largely reduces the computational/memory overhead. items.zh: P_i：第i阶段的补丁大小；

items.en: Cisubscript𝐶𝑖C_{i}: the channel number of the output of Stage i𝑖i;
items.zh: C_i：第i阶段输出的通道数；

items.en: Lisubscript𝐿𝑖L_{i}: the number of encoder layers in Stage i𝑖i;
items.zh: L_i：第i阶段的编码器层数；

items.en: Following the design rules of ResNet [22], we (1) use small output channel numbers in shallow stages; and (2) concentrate the major computation resource in intermediate stages.
items.zh: 遵循ResNet[22]的设计规则，我们（1）在浅层阶段使用较小的输出通道数；（2）将主要计算资源集中在中间阶段。

items.en: To provide instances for discussion, we describe a series of PVT models with different scales, namely PVT-Tiny, -Small, -Medium, and -Large, in Table 1, whose parameter numbers are comparable to ResNet18, 50, 101, and 152 respectively. More details of employing these models in specific downstream tasks will be introduced in Section 4.
items.zh: 为了提供讨论实例，我们在表1中描述了一系列不同规模的PVT模型，即PVT-Tiny、-Small、-Medium和-Large，其参数数量分别与ResNet18、50、101和152相当。在特定下游任务中使用这些模型的更多细节将在第4节中介绍。

items.en: The most related work to our model is ViT [13]. Here, we discuss the relationship and differences between them. First, both PVT and ViT are pure Transformer models without convolutions. The primary difference between them is the pyramid structure. Similar to the traditional Transformer [64], the length of ViT’s output sequence is the same as the input, which means that the output of ViT is single-scale (see Figure 1 (b)). Moreover, due to the limited resource, the input of ViT is coarse-grained (e.g., the patch size is 16 or 32 pixels), and thus its output resolution is relatively low (e.g., 16-stride or 32-stride). As a result, it is difficult to directly apply ViT to dense prediction tasks that require high-resolution or multi-scale feature maps.
items.zh: 与我们的模型最相关的工作是ViT [13]。在此，我们讨论它们之间的关系和差异。首先，PVT和ViT都是纯Transformer模型，没有卷积。它们之间的主要区别在于金字塔结构。与传统Transformer [64]类似，ViT输出序列的长度与输入相同，这意味着ViT的输出是单尺度的（见图1(b)）。此外，由于资源有限，ViT的输入是粗粒度的（例如，patch大小为16或32像素），因此其输出分辨率相对较低（例如，16步长或32步长）。因此，很难将ViT直接应用于需要高分辨率或多尺度特征图的密集预测任务。

items.en: Our PVT breaks the routine of Transformer by introducing a progressive shrinking pyramid. It can generate multi-scale feature maps like a traditional CNN backbone. In addition, we also designed a simple but effective attention layer—SRA, to process high-resolution feature maps and reduce computational/memory costs. Benefiting from the above designs, our method has the following advantages over ViT: 1) more flexible—can generate feature maps of different scales/channels in different stages; 2) more versatile—can be easily plugged and played in most downstream task models; 3) more friendly to computation/memory—can handle higher resolution feature maps or longer sequences.
items.zh: 我们的PVT通过引入渐进收缩金字塔打破了Transformer的常规。它可以像传统CNN骨干一样生成多尺度特征图。此外，我们还设计了一个简单但有效的注意力层——SRA，用于处理高分辨率特征图并降低计算/内存成本。得益于上述设计，我们的方法相比ViT具有以下优势：1）更灵活——可以在不同阶段生成不同尺度/通道的特征图；2）更通用——可以轻松插入并应用于大多数下游任务模型；3）对计算/内存更友好——可以处理更高分辨率的特征图或更长的序列。

items.en: Image classification is the most classical task of image-level prediction. To provide instances for discussion, we design a series of PVT models with different scales, namely PVT-Tiny, -Small, -Medium, and -Large, whose parameter numbers are similar to ResNet18, 50, 101, and 152, respectively. Detailed hyper-parameter settings of the PVT series are provided in the supplementary material (SM).
items.zh: 图像分类是最经典的图像级预测任务。为了提供讨论实例，我们设计了一系列不同尺度的PVT模型，即PVT-Tiny、-Small、-Medium和-Large，其参数数量分别与ResNet18、50、101和152相似。PVT系列的详细超参数设置见补充材料（SM）。

items.en: For image classification, we follow ViT [13] and DeiT [63] to append a learnable classification token to the input of the last stage, and then employ a fully connected (FC) layer to conduct classification on top of the token.
items.zh: 对于图像分类，我们遵循ViT [13]和DeiT [63]，在最后阶段的输入中添加一个可学习的分类token，然后使用全连接（FC）层在该token上进行分类。

items.en: In addition to image-level prediction, dense prediction that requires pixel-level classification or regression to be performed on the feature map, is also often seen in downstream tasks. Here, we discuss two typical tasks, namely object detection, and semantic segmentation.
items.zh: 除了图像级预测，密集预测（需要在特征图上进行像素级分类或回归）也常见于下游任务。在此，我们讨论两个典型任务：目标检测和语义分割。

items.en: We apply our PVT models to three representative dense prediction methods, namely RetinaNet [39], Mask R-CNN [21], and Semantic FPN [32]. RetinaNet is a widely used single-stage detector, Mask R-CNN is the most popular two-stage instance segmentation framework, and Semantic FPN is a vanilla semantic segmentation method without special operations (e.g., dilated convolution). Using these methods as baselines enables us to adequately examine the effectiveness of different backbones.
items.zh: 我们将PVT模型应用于三种代表性的密集预测方法：RetinaNet [39]、Mask R-CNN [21]和Semantic FPN [32]。RetinaNet是广泛使用的单阶段检测器，Mask R-CNN是最流行的两阶段实例分割框架，Semantic FPN是一种没有特殊操作（如空洞卷积）的朴素语义分割方法。使用这些方法作为基线，我们可以充分检验不同骨干网络的有效性。

items.en: The implementation details are as follows: (1) Like ResNet, we initialize the PVT backbone with the weights pre-trained on ImageNet; (2) We use the output feature pyramid {F1,F2,F3,F4}subscript𝐹1subscript𝐹2subscript𝐹3subscript𝐹4\{F_{1},F_{2},F_{3},F_{4}\} as the input of FPN [38], and then the refined feature maps are fed to the follow-up detection/segmentation head; (3) When training the detection/segmentation model, none of the layers in PVT are frozen; (4) Since the input for detection/segmentation can be an arbitrary shape, the position embeddings pre-trained on ImageNet may no longer be meaningful. Therefore, we perform bilinear interpolation on the pre-trained position embeddings according to the input resolution.
items.zh: 实现细节如下：（1）与ResNet类似，我们使用在ImageNet上预训练的权重初始化PVT骨干；（2）我们使用输出特征金字塔{F1,F2,F3,F4}作为FPN [38]的输入，然后将精炼后的特征图送入后续的检测/分割头；（3）在训练检测/分割模型时，PVT中的所有层都不冻结；（4）由于检测/分割的输入可以是任意形状，在ImageNet上预训练的位置嵌入可能不再有意义。因此，我们根据输入分辨率对预训练的位置嵌入进行双线性插值。

items.en: We compare PVT with the two most representative CNN backbones, i.e., ResNet [22] and ResNeXt [73], which are widely used in the benchmarks of many downstream tasks.
items.zh: 我们将PVT与两个最具代表性的CNN骨干（即ResNet [22]和ResNeXt [73]）进行比较，这些骨干广泛用于许多下游任务的基准测试。

items.en: Settings. Image classification experiments are performed on the ImageNet 2012 dataset [51], which comprises 1.28 million training images and 50K validation images from 1,000 categories. For fair comparison, all models are trained on the training set, and report the top-1 error on the validation set. We follow DeiT [63] and apply random cropping, random horizontal flipping [59], label-smoothing regularization [60], mixup [78], CutMix [76], and random erasing [82] as data augmentations. During training, we employ AdamW [46] with a momentum of 0.9, a mini-batch size of 128, and a weight decay of 5×10−25superscript1025\times 10^{-2} to optimize models. The initial learning rate is set to 1×10−31superscript1031\times 10^{-3} and decreases following the cosine schedule [45]. All models are trained for 300 epochs from scratch on 8 V100 GPUs. To benchmark, we apply a center crop on the validation set, where a 224×\times 224 patch is cropped to evaluate the classification accuracy.
items.zh: 设置。图像分类实验在ImageNet 2012数据集[51]上进行，该数据集包含来自1000个类别的128万张训练图像和5万张验证图像。为了公平比较，所有模型在训练集上训练，并在验证集上报告top-1错误率。我们遵循DeiT [63]，应用随机裁剪、随机水平翻转[59]、标签平滑正则化[60]、mixup [78]、CutMix [76]和随机擦除[82]作为数据增强。训练期间，我们使用AdamW [46]优化器，动量0.9，小批量大小128，权重衰减5×10^{-2}。初始学习率设为1×10^{-3}，并按余弦调度[45]衰减。所有模型在8块V100 GPU上从头训练300个epoch。为了基准测试，我们在验证集上应用中心裁剪，裁剪224×224的patch来评估分类准确率。

items.en: Results. In Table 2, we see that our PVT models are superior to conventional CNN backbones under similar parameter numbers and computational budgets. For example, when the GFLOPs are roughly similar, the top-1 error of PVT-Small reaches 20.2, which is 1.3 points higher than that of ResNet50 [22] (20.2 vs. 21.5). Meanwhile, under similar or lower complexity, PVT models archive performances comparable to the recently proposed Transformer-based models, such as ViT [13] and DeiT [63] (PVT-Large: 18.3 vs. ViT(DeiT)-Base/16: 18.3). Here, we clarify that these results are within our expectations, because the pyramid structure is beneficial to dense prediction tasks, but brings little improvements to image classification.
items.zh: 结果。在表2中，我们看到我们的PVT模型在相似参数数量和计算预算下优于传统CNN骨干。例如，当GFLOPs大致相似时，PVT-Small的top-1错误率达到20.2，比ResNet50 [22]高1.3个百分点（20.2 vs. 21.5）。同时，在相似或更低的复杂度下，PVT模型取得了与最近提出的基于Transformer的模型（如ViT [13]和DeiT [63]）相当的性能（PVT-Large: 18.3 vs. ViT(DeiT)-Base/16: 18.3）。在此，我们澄清这些结果符合我们的预期，因为金字塔结构有利于密集预测任务，但对图像分类的提升较小。

items.en: Note that ViT and DeiT have limitations as they are specifically designed for classification tasks, and thus are not suitable for dense prediction tasks, which usually require effective feature pyramids.
items.zh: 注意，ViT和DeiT存在局限性，因为它们专门为分类任务设计，因此不适合通常需要有效特征金字塔的密集预测任务。

items.en: Settings. Object detection experiments are conducted on the challenging COCO benchmark [40]. All models are trained on COCO train2017 (118k images) and evaluated on val2017 (5k images). We verify the effectiveness of PVT backbones on top of two standard detectors, namely RetinaNet [39] and Mask R-CNN [21]. Before training, we use the weights pre-trained on ImageNet to initialize the backbone and Xavier [18] to initialize the newly added layers. Our models are trained with a batch size of 16 on 8 V100 GPUs and optimized by AdamW [46] with an initial learning rate of 1×10−41superscript1041\times 10^{-4}. Following common practices [39, 21, 7], we adopt 1×\times or 3×\times training schedule (i.e., 12 or 36 epochs) to train all detection models. The training image is resized to have a shorter side of 800 pixels, while the longer side does not exceed 1,333 pixels. When using the 3×\times training schedule, we randomly resize the shorter side of the input image within the range of [640,800]640800[640,800]. In the testing phase, the shorter side of the input image is fixed to 800 pixels.
items.zh: 设置。目标检测实验在具有挑战性的COCO基准[40]上进行。所有模型在COCO train2017（118k张图像）上训练，并在val2017（5k张图像）上评估。我们在两个标准检测器（RetinaNet [39]和Mask R-CNN [21]）上验证PVT骨干的有效性。训练前，我们使用在ImageNet上预训练的权重初始化骨干，并使用Xavier [18]初始化新添加的层。我们的模型在8块V100 GPU上以批量大小16进行训练，并使用AdamW [46]优化，初始学习率1×10^{-4}。遵循常见做法[39, 21, 7]，我们采用1×或3×训练计划（即12或36个epoch）来训练所有检测模型。训练图像被调整为短边800像素，长边不超过1333像素。使用3×训练计划时，我们在[640,800]范围内随机调整输入图像的短边。测试阶段，输入图像的短边固定为800像素。

items.en: Results. As shown in Table 3, when using RetinaNet for object detection, we find that under comparable number of parameters, the PVT-based models significantly surpasses their counterparts. For example, with the 1×\times training schedule, the AP of PVT-Tiny is 4.9 points better than that of ResNet18 (36.7 vs. 31.8). Moreover, with the 3×\times training schedule and multi-scale training, PVT-Large archive the best AP of 43.4, surpassing ResNeXt101-64x4d (43.4 vs. 41.8), while our parameter number is 30% fewer. These results indicate that our PVT can be a good alternative to the CNN backbone for object detection.
items.zh: 结果。如表3所示，当使用RetinaNet进行目标检测时，我们发现，在参数数量相当的情况下，基于PVT的模型显著优于其对应模型。例如，在1×训练计划下，PVT-Tiny的AP比ResNet18高4.9个百分点（36.7 vs. 31.8）。此外，在3×训练计划和多尺度训练下，PVT-Large取得了最佳AP 43.4，超过了ResNeXt101-64x4d（43.4 vs. 41.8），而我们的参数数量减少了30%。这些结果表明，我们的PVT可以成为目标检测中CNN骨干的良好替代方案。

items.en: Similar results are found in instance segmentation experiments based on Mask R-CNN, as shown in Table 4. With the 1×\times training schedule, PVT-Tiny achieves 35.1 mask AP (APm), which is 3.9 points better than ResNet18 (35.1 vs. 31.2) and even 0.7 points higher than ResNet50 (35.1 vs. 34.4). The best APm obtained by PVT-Large is 40.7, which is 1.0 points higher than ResNeXt101-64x4d (40.7 vs. 39.7), with 20% fewer parameters.
items.zh: 在基于Mask R-CNN的实例分割实验中发现了类似的结果，如表4所示。在1×训练计划下，PVT-Tiny实现了35.1的掩膜AP（APm），比ResNet18高3.9个百分点（35.1 vs. 31.2），甚至比ResNet50高0.7个百分点（35.1 vs. 34.4）。PVT-Large获得的最佳APm为40.7，比ResNeXt101-64x4d高1.0个百分点（40.7 vs. 39.7），参数减少20%。

items.en: Settings. We choose ADE20K [83], a challenging scene parsing dataset, to benchmark the performance of semantic segmentation. ADE20K contains 150 fine-grained semantic categories, with 20,210, 2,000, and 3,352 images for training, validation, and testing, respectively. We evaluate our PVT backbones on the basis of Semantic FPN [32], a simple segmentation method without dilated convolutions [74]. In the training phase, the backbone is initialized with the weights pre-trained on ImageNet [12], and other newly added layers are initialized with Xavier [18]. We optimize our models using AdamW [46] with an initial learning rate of 1e-4. Following common practices [32, 8], we train our models for 80k iterations with a batch size of 16 on 4 V100 GPUs. The learning rate is decayed following the polynomial decay schedule with a power of 0.9. We randomly resize and crop the image to 512×512512512512\times 512 for training, and rescale to have a shorter side of 512 pixels during testing.
items.zh: 设置。我们选择ADE20K [83]（一个具有挑战性的场景解析数据集）来基准测试语义分割性能。ADE20K包含150个细粒度语义类别，训练集、验证集和测试集分别有20,210、2,000和3,352张图像。我们在Semantic FPN [32]（一种没有空洞卷积的简单分割方法[74]）的基础上评估我们的PVT骨干。训练阶段，骨干使用在ImageNet [12]上预训练的权重初始化，其他新添加的层使用Xavier [18]初始化。我们使用AdamW [46]优化模型，初始学习率1e-4。遵循常见做法[32, 8]，我们在4块V100 GPU上以批量大小16训练模型80k次迭代。学习率按照多项式衰减调度衰减，幂指数0.9。我们随机调整大小并裁剪图像至512×512用于训练，测试时缩放至短边512像素。

items.en: Results. As shown in Table 5, when using Semantic FPN [32] for semantic segmentation, PVT-based models consistently outperforms the models based on ResNet [22] or ResNeXt [73]. For example, with almost the same number of parameters and GFLOPs, our PVT-Tiny/Small/Medium are at least 2.8 points higher than ResNet-18/50/101. In addition, although the parameter number and GFLOPs of our PVT-Large are 20% lower than those of ResNeXt101-64x4d, the mIoU is still 1.9 points higher (42.1 vs. 40.2). With a longer training schedule and multi-scale testing, PVT-Large+Semantic FPN archives the best mIoU of 44.8, which is very close to the state-of-the-art performance of the ADE20K benchmark. Note that Semantic FPN is just a simple segmentation head. These results demonstrate that our PVT backbones can extract better features for semantic segmentation than the CNN backbone, benefiting from the global attention mechanism.
items.zh: 结果。如表5所示，当使用Semantic FPN [32]进行语义分割时，基于PVT的模型始终优于基于ResNet [22]或ResNeXt [73]的模型。例如，在参数数量和GFLOPs几乎相同的情况下，我们的PVT-Tiny/Small/Medium至少比ResNet-18/50/101高2.8个百分点。此外，尽管我们的PVT-Large的参数数量和GFLOPs比ResNeXt101-64x4d低20%，但mIoU仍然高1.9个百分点（42.1 vs. 40.2）。在更长的训练计划和多尺度测试下，PVT-Large+Semantic FPN取得了最佳mIoU 44.8，非常接近ADE20K基准的最新性能。注意，Semantic FPN只是一个简单的分割头。这些结果表明，我们的PVT骨干可以比CNN骨干提取更好的特征用于语义分割，这得益于全局注意力机制。

items.en: PVT+DETR. To reach the limit of no convolution, we build a pure Transformer pipeline for object detection by simply combining our PVT with a Transformer-based detection head—DETR [6]. We train models on COCO train2017 for 50 epochs with an initial learning rate of 1×10−41superscript1041\times 10^{-4}. The learning rate is divided by 10 at the 33rd epoch. We use random flipping and multi-scale training as data augmentation. All other experimental settings is the same as those in Sec. 5.2. As reported in Table 6, PVT-based DETR archieves 34.7 AP on COCO val2017, outperforming the original ResNet50-based DETR by 2.4 points (34.7 vs. 32.3). These results prove that a pure Transformer detector can also works well in the object detection task.
items.zh: PVT+DETR。为了达到无卷积的极限，我们通过简单地将PVT与基于Transformer的检测头DETR [6]结合，构建了一个纯Transformer的目标检测流水线。我们在COCO train2017上训练模型50个epoch，初始学习率1×10^{-4}。学习率在第33个epoch除以10。我们使用随机翻转和多尺度训练作为数据增强。所有其他实验设置与第5.2节相同。如表6所示，基于PVT的DETR在COCO val2017上取得了34.7 AP，比原始的基于ResNet50的DETR高2.4个百分点（34.7 vs. 32.3）。这些结果证明，纯Transformer检测器在目标检测任务中也能很好地工作。

items.en: PVT+Trans2Seg.We build a pure Transformer model for semantic segmentation by combining our PVT with Trans2Seg [72], a Transformer-based segmentation head. According to the experimental settings in Sec. 5.3, we perform experiments on ADE20K [83] with 40k iterations training, single scale testing, and compare it with ResNet50+Trans2Seg [72] and DeeplabV3+ [9] with ResNet50-d8 (dilation 8) and -d16(dilation 8) in Table 7. We find that our PVT-Small+Trans2Seg achieves 42.6 mIoU, outperforming ResNet50-d8+DeeplabV3+ (41.5). Note that, ResNet50-d8+DeeplabV3+ has 120.5 GFLOPs due to the high computation cost of dilated convolution, and our method has only 31.6 GFLOPs, which is 4 times fewer. In addition, our PVT-Small+Trans2Seg performs better than ResNet50-d16+Trans2Seg (mIoU: 42.6 vs. 39.7, GFlops: 31.6 vs. 79.3). These results prove that a pure Transformer segmentation network is workable.
items.zh: PVT+Trans2Seg。我们通过将PVT与基于Transformer的分割头Trans2Seg [72]结合，构建了一个纯Transformer的语义分割模型。根据第5.3节的实验设置，我们在ADE20K [83]上进行了40k次迭代训练、单尺度测试的实验，并在表7中与ResNet50+Trans2Seg [72]以及使用ResNet50-d8（膨胀率8）和-d16（膨胀率8）的DeeplabV3+ [9]进行了比较。我们发现，我们的PVT-Small+Trans2Seg取得了42.6 mIoU，优于ResNet50-d8+DeeplabV3+（41.5）。注意，由于空洞卷积的高计算成本，ResNet50-d8+DeeplabV3+有120.5 GFLOPs，而我们的方法只有31.6 GFLOPs，减少了4倍。此外，我们的PVT-Small+Trans2Seg优于ResNet50-d16+Trans2Seg（mIoU: 42.6 vs. 39.7, GFlops: 31.6 vs. 79.3）。这些结果证明，纯Transformer分割网络是可行的。

items.en: Settings. We conduct ablation studies on ImageNet [12] and COCO [40] datasets. The experimental settings on ImageNet are the same as the settings in Sec. 5.1. For COCO, all models are trained with a 1×\times training schedule (i.e., 12 epochs) and without multi-scale training, and other settings follow those in Sec. 5.2.
items.zh: 设置。我们在ImageNet [12]和COCO [40]数据集上进行消融研究。ImageNet上的实验设置与第5.1节相同。对于COCO，所有模型使用1×训练计划（即12个epoch）且不使用多尺度训练，其他设置遵循第5.2节。

items.en: Pyramid Structure. A Pyramid structure is crucial when applying Transformer to dense prediction tasks. ViT (see Figure 1 (b)) is a columnar framework, whose output is single-scale. This results in a low-resolution output feature map when using coarse image patches (e.g., 32×\times32 pixels per patch) as input, leading to poor detection performance (31.7 AP on COCO val2017),333For adapting ViT to RetinaNet, we extract the features from the layer 2, 4, 6, and 8 of ViT-Small/32, and interpolate them to different scales. as shown in Table 8. When using fine-grained image patches (e.g., 4×\times4 pixels per patch) as input like our PVT, ViT will exhaust the GPU memory (32G). Our method avoids this problem through a progressive shrinking pyramid. Specifically, our model can process high-resolution feature maps in shallow stages and low-resolution feature maps in deep stages. Thus, it obtains a promising AP of 40.4 on COCO val2017, 8.7 points higher than ViT-Small/32 (40.4 vs. 31.7).
items.zh: 金字塔结构。金字塔结构对于将Transformer应用于密集预测任务至关重要。ViT（见图1(b)）是一种柱状框架，其输出是单尺度的。这导致在使用粗图像块（例如，每个patch 32×32像素）作为输入时，输出特征图分辨率低，从而导致检测性能差（COCO val2017上AP为31.7），3如表8所示。当像我们的PVT一样使用细粒度图像块（例如，每个patch 4×4像素）作为输入时，ViT将耗尽GPU内存（32G）。我们的方法通过渐进收缩金字塔避免了这个问题。具体来说，我们的模型可以在浅层处理高分辨率特征图，在深层处理低分辨率特征图。因此，它在COCO val2017上获得了有前景的AP 40.4，比ViT-Small/32高8.7个百分点（40.4 vs. 31.7）。

items.capEn: Figure 5: AP curves of RetinaNet on COCO val2017 under different backbone settings. Top: using weights pre-trained on ImageNet vs. random initialization. Bottom: PVT-S vs. R50 [22].
items.capZh: 图5：不同主干设置下RetinaNet在COCO val2017上的AP曲线。上方：使用ImageNet预训练权重与随机初始化对比。下方：PVT-S与R50 [22]对比。

items.en: Deeper vs. Wider. The problem of whether the CNN backbone should go deeper or wider has been extensively discussed in previous work [22, 77]. Here, we explore this problem in our PVT. For fair comparisons, we multiply the hidden dimensions {C1,C2,C3,C4}subscript𝐶1subscript𝐶2subscript𝐶3subscript𝐶4\{C_{1},C_{2},C_{3},C_{4}\} of PVT-Small by a scale factor 1.4 to make it have an equivalent parameter number to the deep model (i.e., PVT-Medium). As shown in Table 9, the deep model (i.e., PVT-Medium) consistently works better than the wide model (i.e., PVT-Small-Wide) on both ImageNet and COCO. Therefore, going deeper is more effective than going wider in the design of PVT. Based on this observation, in Table 1, we develop PVT models with different scales by increasing the model depth.
items.zh: 更深 vs. 更宽。CNN主干应该更深还是更宽的问题已在先前工作中广泛讨论[22, 77]。这里，我们在PVT中探讨这一问题。为公平比较，我们将PVT-Small的隐藏维度{C1,C2,C3,C4}乘以缩放因子1.4，使其参数量与深层模型（即PVT-Medium）相当。如表9所示，深层模型（即PVT-Medium）在ImageNet和COCO上均优于宽模型（即PVT-Small-Wide）。因此，在PVT设计中，加深比加宽更有效。基于这一观察，在表1中，我们通过增加模型深度开发了不同规模的PVT模型。

items.en: Pre-trained Weights. Most dense prediction models (e.g., RetinaNet [39]) rely on the backbone whose weights are pre-trained on ImageNet. We also discuss this problem in our PVT. In the top of Figure 5, we plot the validation AP curves of RetinaNet-PVT-Small w/ (red curves) and w/o (blue curves) pre-trained weights. We find that the model w/ pre-trained weights converges better than the one w/o pre-trained weights, and the gap between their final AP reaches 13.8 under the 1×\times training schedule and 8.4 under the 3×\times training schedule and multi-scale training. Therefore, like CNN-based models, pre-training weights can also help PVT-based models converge faster and better. Moreover, in the bottom of Figure 5, we also see that the convergence speed of PVT-based models (red curves) is faster than that of ResNet-based models (green curves).
items.zh: 预训练权重。大多数密集预测模型（如RetinaNet [39]）依赖于在ImageNet上预训练权重的骨干网络。我们也在PVT中讨论了这一问题。在图5上方，我们绘制了RetinaNet-PVT-Small使用（红色曲线）和不使用（蓝色曲线）预训练权重的验证AP曲线。我们发现，使用预训练权重的模型比不使用预训练权重的模型收敛更好，在1×训练计划下最终AP差距达到13.8，在3×训练计划和多尺度训练下达到8.4。因此，与基于CNN的模型类似，预训练权重也能帮助基于PVT的模型更快更好地收敛。此外，在图5下方，我们还看到基于PVT的模型（红色曲线）的收敛速度快于基于ResNet的模型（绿色曲线）。

items.en: PVT vs. “CNN w/ Non-Local” To obtain a global receptive field, some well-engineered CNN backbones, such as GCNet [5], integrate the non-local block in the CNN framework. Here, we compare the performance of our PVT (pure Transformer) and GCNet (CNN w/ non-local), using Mask R-CNN for instance segmentation. As reported in Table 10, we find that our PVT-Small outperforms ResNet50+GC r4 [5] by 1.6 points in APm (37.8 vs. 36.2), and 2.0 points in APm75superscriptsubscriptabsent75m{}_{75}^{\rm m} (38.3 vs. 40.3), under comparable parameter number and GFLOPs. There are two possible reasons for this result:
items.zh: PVT vs. “CNN w/ Non-Local”。为获得全局感受野，一些精心设计的CNN主干（如GCNet [5]）在CNN框架中集成了非局部块。这里，我们比较PVT（纯Transformer）和GCNet（CNN w/ non-local）的性能，使用Mask R-CNN进行实例分割。如表10所示，我们发现，在参数量和GFLOPs相当的情况下，PVT-Small在APm上比ResNet50+GC r4 [5]高出1.6个点（37.8 vs. 36.2），在APm75上高出2.0个点（38.3 vs. 40.3）。这一结果可能有两个原因：

items.en: (1) Although a single global attention layer (e.g., non-local [70] or multi-head attention (MHA) [64]) can acquire global-receptive-field features, the model performance keeps improving as the model deepens. This indicates that stacking multiple MHAs can further enhance the representation capabilities of features. Therefore, as a pure Transformer backbone with more global attention layers, our PVT tends to perform better than the CNN backbone equipped with non-local blocks (e.g., GCNet).
items.zh: （1）尽管单层全局注意力（如非局部[70]或多头注意力（MHA）[64]）可以获取全局感受野特征，但模型性能随着深度增加而持续提升。这表明堆叠多个MHA可以进一步增强特征的表示能力。因此，作为具有更多全局注意力层的纯Transformer主干，我们的PVT往往优于配备非局部块的CNN主干（如GCNet）。

items.en: (2) Regular convolutions can be deemed as special instantiations of spatial attention mechanisms [84]. In other words, the format of MHA is more flexible than the regular convolution. For example, for different inputs, the weights of the convolution are fixed, but the attention weights of MHA change dynamically with the input. Thus, the features learned by the pure Transformer backbone full of MHA layers, could be more flexible and expressive.
items.zh: （2）常规卷积可被视为空间注意力机制的特殊实例化[84]。换句话说，MHA的形式比常规卷积更灵活。例如，对于不同输入，卷积的权重是固定的，而MHA的注意力权重随输入动态变化。因此，由充满MHA层的纯Transformer主干学习到的特征可能更灵活且更具表现力。

items.en: With increasing input scale, the growth rate of the GFLOPs of our PVT is greater than ResNet [22], but lower than ViT [13], as shown in Figure 6. However, when the input scale does not exceed 640×\times640 pixels, the GFLOPs of PVT-Small and ResNet50 are similar. This means that our PVT is more suitable for tasks with medium-resolution input.
items.zh: 随着输入尺度的增加，我们PVT的GFLOPs增长率大于ResNet [22]，但低于ViT [13]，如图6所示。然而，当输入尺度不超过640×640像素时，PVT-Small和ResNet50的GFLOPs相似。这意味着我们的PVT更适合中等分辨率输入的任务。

items.en: On COCO, the shorter side of the input image is 800 pixels. Under this condition, the inference speed of RetinaNet based on PVT-Small is slower than the ResNet50-based model, as reported in Table 11. (1) A direct solution for this problem is to reduce the input scale. When reducing the shorter side of the input image to 640 pixels, the model based on PVT-Small runs faster than the ResNet50-based model (51.7ms vs., 55.9ms), with 2.4 higher AP (38.7 vs. 36.3). 2) Another solution is to develop a self-attention layer with lower computational complexity. This is a worth exploring direction, we recently propose a solution PVTv2 [67].
items.zh: 在COCO上，输入图像的较短边为800像素。在此条件下，基于PVT-Small的RetinaNet推理速度慢于基于ResNet50的模型，如表11所示。（1）解决此问题的一个直接方法是减小输入尺度。当将输入图像的较短边减小到640像素时，基于PVT-Small的模型运行速度快于基于ResNet50的模型（51.7ms vs. 55.9ms），AP高出2.4（38.7 vs. 36.3）。（2）另一种解决方案是开发计算复杂度更低的自注意力层。这是一个值得探索的方向，我们最近提出了一个解决方案PVTv2 [67]。

items.en: Detection & Segmentation Results. In Figure 7, we also present some qualitative object detection and instance segmentation results on COCO val2017 [40], and semantic segmentation results on ADE20K [83]. These results indicate that a pure Transformer backbone (i.e., PVT) without convolutions can also be easily plugged in dense prediction models (e.g., RetinaNet [39], Mask R-CNN [21], and Semantic FPN [32]), and obtain high-quality results.
items.zh: 检测与分割结果。在图7中，我们还展示了COCO val2017 [40]上的一些定性目标检测和实例分割结果，以及ADE20K [83]上的语义分割结果。这些结果表明，不含卷积的纯Transformer主干（即PVT）也可以轻松嵌入密集预测模型（如RetinaNet [39]、Mask R-CNN [21]和Semantic FPN [32]），并获得高质量的结果。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Models’ GFLOPs under different input scales. The growth rate of GFLOPs: ViT-Small/16 [13]>>ViT-Small/32 [13]>>PVT-Small (ours)>>ResNet50 [22]. When the input scale is less than 640×640640640640\times 640, the GFLOPs of PVT-Small and ResNet50 [22] are similar.
items.capZh: 图6：不同输入尺度下模型的GFLOPs。GFLOPs增长率：ViT-Small/16 [13] >> ViT-Small/32 [13] >> PVT-Small（我们的）>> ResNet50 [22]。当输入尺度小于640×640时，PVT-Small和ResNet50 [22]的GFLOPs相似。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Qualitative results of object detection and instance segmentation on COCO val2017 [40], and semantic segmentation on ADE20K [83]. The results (from left to right) are generated by PVT-Small-based RetinaNet [39], Mask R-CNN [21], and Semantic FPN [32], respectively.
items.capZh: 图7：COCO val2017 [40]上的目标检测和实例分割，以及ADE20K [83]上的语义分割的定性结果。结果（从左到右）分别由基于PVT-Small的RetinaNet [39]、Mask R-CNN [21]和Semantic FPN [32]生成。

items.en: We introduce PVT, a pure Transformer backbone for dense prediction tasks, such as object detection and semantic segmentation. We develop a progressive shrinking pyramid and a spatial-reduction attention layer to obtain high-resolution and multi-scale feature maps under limited computation/memory resources. Extensive experiments on object detection and semantic segmentation benchmarks verify that our PVT is stronger than well-designed CNN backbones under comparable numbers of parameters.
items.zh: 我们介绍了PVT，一种用于密集预测任务（如目标检测和语义分割）的纯Transformer主干。我们开发了渐进式收缩金字塔和空间缩减注意力层，以在有限的计算/内存资源下获得高分辨率和多尺度特征图。在目标检测和语义分割基准上的大量实验验证，在可比参数数量下，我们的PVT优于精心设计的CNN主干。

items.en: Although PVT can serve as an alternative to CNN backbones (e.g., ResNet, ResNeXt), there are still some specific modules and operations designed for CNNs and not considered in this work, such as SE [23], SK [36], dilated convolution [74], model pruning [20], and NAS [61]. Moreover, with years of rapid developments, there have been many well-engineered CNN backbones such as Res2Net [17], EfficientNet [61], and ResNeSt [79]. In contrast, the Transformer-based model in computer vision is still in its early stage of development. Therefore, we believe there are many potential technologies and applications (e.g., OCR [68, 66, 69], 3D [28, 11, 27] and medical [15, 16, 29] image analysis) to be explored in the future, and hope that PVT could serve as a good starting point.
items.zh: 尽管PVT可以作为CNN主干（如ResNet、ResNeXt）的替代方案，但仍有一些专门为CNN设计的特定模块和操作未在本工作中考虑，例如SE [23]、SK [36]、空洞卷积[74]、模型剪枝[20]和NAS [61]。此外，经过多年的快速发展，已有许多精心设计的CNN主干，如Res2Net [17]、EfficientNet [61]和ResNeSt [79]。相比之下，计算机视觉中基于Transformer的模型仍处于早期发展阶段。因此，我们相信未来有许多潜在的技术和应用（例如OCR [68, 66, 69]、3D [28, 11, 27]和医学[15, 16, 29]图像分析）值得探索，并希望PVT能成为一个良好的起点。
